## JOB BOARD SCAN

*Note: Web search unavailable at 4:30am (search API overloaded). Manual scan recommended.*

**Check these at your desk:**
- **Warpcast jobs channel** (`/jobs` on Farcaster) — Farcaster-native DevRel, PM, community roles post here frequently
- **Crypto Twitter / X** — search `"hiring" "remote" "web3" "community" OR "DevRel" OR "advocate"` — filter last 24h
- **Wellfound** (`wellfound.com/jobs`) — filter: Web3/Crypto, Remote, Community or Developer Relations, $35/hr+
- **crypto.jobs** — aggregates most Farcaster/web3 postings

- DevRel / Developer Advocate at Farcaster-ecosystem protocol (Neynar, Coinbase, Base, Privy, Zora)
- Community Manager / Head of Community at web3 music or creator platform

## FARCASTER ENGAGEMENT OPPORTUNITIES

*Web search unavailable for live scan. Three evergreen angles based on your current build:*

### 1. ZOE recall going live — the "system remembering itself" angle
> "Shipped ZOE recall this week — RAG-style graph context on every turn. Before she acts she reads her own history. The gap between routing and wisdom is smaller than I thought. Next: Bonfire labeling unlocks the full memory layer."

Post in a thread about agent memory / AI infra. Positions you as: builder who shipped it, not speculator.

### 2. 160-commit week as a build-in-public moment
> "160 commits to main in 7 days. ZOE can now receive (Bonfire drain loop), remember (recall wiring), and act (orchestrator). The system is no longer just routing — it's reading its history before it acts. What's your agent's memory layer?"

Strong engagement hook for builder threads.

### 3. ZABAL Games governance model — quadratic vs. weighted
> "Running community governance for 188-member DAO (90+ weeks of fractal). We're deciding: weighted Snapshot vs. 1-token-1-vote vs. quadratic for ZABAL Games submissions. What are you using and what broke first?"

Ask-for-advice format. High engagement, positions you as experienced community builder not theorizer.
